violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (dough shaper and liquid measuring cups) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took items out of service to be washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
Chemical bottle was observed stored on the same shelf with food/equipment in the dough mixing area. PIC relocated bottle. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

Inspector observed dough mixer with plastic and paper towels wrapped around midsection. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. PIC has new seals on order. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Per interview of staff, in-use utensils (pizza cutters, tongs, spatulas) are only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. Manager corrected staff person and stated in-use utensils are washed/sanitized every 4 hours. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

The following food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils observed with an accumulation of food and debris: - dough shaper machine - can opener - whisk - liquid measuring cups The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. Inspector observed staff washing, rinsing, and air drying dishes without sanitizing them. PIC talked with staff and filled sanitizer bay of the 3 bay sink. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. PIC added more water and retested. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025
Chemicals were stored on the same shelf with food/equipment/single service articles in the dough station area. PIC relocated chemical. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the front and back, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the food storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Inspector observed dough mixer with a plastic and paper towels wrapped around midsection. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - dough mixer (food debris) - kitchen timer (food debris) - shelving units (food debris) - beverage dunnage racks (droppings) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

The following was observed in poor repair. - bathroom ceiling tiles (holes) - kitchen ceiling tiles (missing tiles) - back door frame (hole)The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

Per interview of staff, in-use utensils (pizza cutters, tongs, spatulas) are only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. Informed owner. Owner placed items in 3 bay sink to be washed and sanitized and informed employees. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

The following food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. - dough shaper machine, - can opener, - whisk, - liquid measuring cups. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC placed in 3 bay sink and took dough machine out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
Chemicals were stored on the same shelf with food/equipment/single service articles in the dough station. PIC removed chemical. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the front and back of establishment, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

Inspector observed dough mixer with plastic bags and paper towels tied around waist of machine. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - dough mixer, - kitchen timer, - shelving units, - beverage dunnage racks. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

The following was observed in poor repair. - bathroom ceiling tiles (previous water damage and holes) - kitchen ceiling tiles (missing tiles) - storage area (hole in tile)The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The floors in the storage area has an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or old droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The following food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils were observed with an accumulation of food and debris: - dough machine, - can opener, - whisk, - liquid measuring cups, - pizza pans, - knife. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Employee took items out of service to be washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

Per interview of staff, in-use utensils are only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. Employee informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

Various TCS items were observed held between 46-54 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC relocated items to walk-in cooler for active cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

Chemical bottles were observed stored with food, equipment, utensils, or single service items throughout the establishment. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Employee relocated chemical bottles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Employee refilled sanitizing bay and inspector retested. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

Working containers of various dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the front and back, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

Inspector observed dough mixer with plastic bags and paper towels tied around waist of mixer. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

Inspector observed prep unit with an ambient of 56 degrees F. Establishment NOT to use prep unit for TCS items until unit is serviced AND can maintain TCS food items at or under 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - walk-in fan cover/ceiling, - pizza prep unit, - dough mixer, - ALL shelving units, - kitchen timer. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The ceiling tiles in the bathroom (previous water damage), kitchen (missing tiles), storage area (hole in tile) and back door frame (falling apart) are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
Handwashing sink is employees restroom is lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and base) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC moved to warewashing area for washing and sanitizing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (quat and chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink ). New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (walk in cooler shelves and doors ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The (walls, door frame, and ceiling ) in the (kitchen and bathroom ) area is in poor repair. Observed holes, water stains, and/or other damage The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
